title: GitHub CLI Tooling Configuration
description: Optional configuration for the gh-tooling MCP server. Provides default repository and tool settings. Config file: .mcp-gh-tooling.json

repo.description: Default GitHub repository in 'owner/repo' format. Used when 'repo' is not passed to individual tool calls.

enforce_mcp_tools.description: When true (default), PreToolUse hooks block direct 'gh' bash commands (gh pr view, gh issue view, gh run view, gh search, etc.) and suggest using MCP tools instead. Set to false to disable all gh hook enforcement.

block_api_commands.description: When true (and enforce_mcp_tools is also true), additionally blocks direct 'gh api' calls for endpoints that have a dedicated gh-tooling MCP tool: pulls/N/comments (pr_comments), pulls/N/reviews (pr_reviews), pulls/N/files (pr_files), pulls/N/commits (pr_commits), actions/jobs/N/logs (job_logs), actions/jobs/N (job_view), check-runs/N/annotations (job_annotations), commits/SHA/pulls (commit_pulls). Other 'gh api' calls remain unblocked. Defaults to false.

log_file.description: Additional log file path. Relative paths resolve against the project root. The default server.log continues to be written; this file is strictly additive.

enable_write_server.description: When true, the write MCP server exposes write tools (PR creation, issue editing, reviews, etc.). When false (default), the write server returns an empty tools list.

block_api_tool_read.description: When true, the read server's api_read tool blocks requests to endpoints that have a dedicated read MCP tool, suggesting the dedicated tool instead.

block_api_tool_write.description: When true, the write server's api tool blocks requests to endpoints that have a dedicated write MCP tool, suggesting the dedicated tool instead.

labels.description: Label name to description mapping. Injected into the SessionStart prompt so the model understands label semantics when adding, removing, or suggesting labels.
